# Phase 4 Closure Retry Plan

This planning note records the Phase 4 closure retry posture after legacy runtime segregation.

## Retry Concepts

- Segregation validation
- No false certification review
- Runtime-disabled truth review
- Governance integrity review
- Orchestration integrity review
- Institutional readiness review
- Contributor governance review
- CI readiness review
- Survivability review

## Boundaries

This plan does not create workflows, deployment automation, provider integrations, runtime communication, credentials, branch protection settings, route rewrites, route deletion, or automatic approvals.

## Closure Retry Posture

Phase 4 may close only if legacy runtime surfaces remain explicitly non-certified and outside the governance-certified runtime architecture.
